comment: Parakeet model catalog. Distribution (decided 2026-07-13): the plugin SHIPS with the standard transcription model (Whisper Small Q5) + silero VAD bundled; the standard summarizer (Qwen3.5 2B) auto-downloads on first run (1.3 GB is too heavy for the Plugins Admin zip). All other models are in-panel downloads. This file is the SHIPPED baseline index; the plugin periodically fetches the LIVE index (index_url below, nppPluginList-style) from the Parakeet plugin repo so new models appear without a plugin update — remote entries merge over these by id, shipped file wins on parse failure. Hosting: our own GitHub models repo releases — no HuggingFace dependency at runtime, our own pinned sha256s. Models install to <plugins-config>/Parakeet/models/.

models.name: Silero VAD v5
models.notes: Internal voice-activity model (utterance segmentation). BUNDLED; hidden from the models UI.

models.name: Whisper Small (Q5)
models.notes: BUNDLED with the plugin — the standard transcription model. Strong accuracy incl. non-English; real-time on any modern Mac.

models.name: Whisper Base (Q5)
models.notes: Lightweight option — faster and smaller than Small; weaker outside English.

models.name: Whisper Small
models.notes: Full-precision Small for maximum quality below the large tier.

models.name: Qwen3.5 2B (Q4)
models.notes: STANDARD summarizer (Phase 2): Apache-2.0, 100+ languages (matches Whisper), 262k context = whole meeting transcripts without chunking. Needs current llama.cpp (Gated DeltaNet). Auto-downloads in the background on first run (too big to bundle in the plugin zip).

models.name: Qwen3.5 0.8B (Q4)
models.notes: Low-RAM summarizer (Intel Macs / 8 GB machines). Same architecture and language coverage as the 2B.

models.name: MiniCPM5 1B (Q4)
models.notes: Alternative: highest intelligence-per-byte at 1B (OpenBMB, Apache-2.0, standard Llama arch — zero llama.cpp risk). English/Chinese ONLY — poor at other languages, hence not the default.
